global.description: The ad features a travel theme with a focus on special fares.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for travel with HorizonHop.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left corner, featuring the text 'HorizonHop' in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center, visually representing a travel-related theme with abstract shapes.

elements.label: Abstract shape
elements.description: An oval shape in the center, adding a dynamic visual element to the ad.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A larger rectangle in the center, providing a backdrop for the main message.

elements.label: Small abstract shape
elements.description: A smaller oval shape positioned slightly above the main rectangle, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: Fly smarter text
elements.description: Bold text in white, centrally positioned, stating 'Fly smarter' with a modern font.

elements.label: Special fares text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message, reading 'Special fares today' in a clean, readable font.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center, labeled 'Shop now' in bold white text against a contrasting background.

elements.label: Shop now text
elements.description: Text on the button that encourages action, designed to stand out for easy visibility.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the brand name 'HorizonHop' in a modern font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, HorizonHop, special fares
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main content area is central, and the CTA is at the bottom.
